info.title: Data Model
info.description: Access 4 Learning® Community Unity Data Model

get.summary: Default operation to get a list of all available SEAInfos
get.description: Default operation to get a list of all available SEAInfos

202.description: Accepted. Returned for DELAYED requests. No payload.

head.description: Get HEAD info for SEAInfos. Returns all HTTP Headers but no payload, otherwise it works like HTTP GET.

200.description: Operation succeeded. No payload returned for HTTP HEAD.
